bits.premise: A car wash banning visible tattoos misunderstands that tattooed workers make customers trust them more.
Tattoos signal that a worker has been through something, which makes nurses more convincing than doctors.
Blue-collar workers should look physically rough enough to do the job.

lines.text: - Yeah!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: When I first moved to Austin,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was working at his car wash called
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Serve Through Car Wash,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they hired me as a manager,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then afterwards told me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that tattoos are not except like they can't be seen
lines.label: setup

lines.text: at the car wash.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And that let me know these niggas aren't good with money
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because the more tattoos you have,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the more people trust you with their car.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You don't want a blank nigga telling you
lines.label: tag

lines.text: your rims are dirty.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You don't want a blank nigga
lines.label: tag

lines.text: looking at your transmission.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You want a fell in with a throat tattoo
lines.label: tag

lines.text: being like your filter's dirty.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You're like, whatever you need, sir,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: just don't go back to jail.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Tattoos lets you know a motherfucker
lines.label: setup

lines.text: went through something to work here.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like doctors don't have tattoos.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Surgeons don't have tattoos.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know who do?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nurses.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Nurses are sexy as fuck.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: If the hospitals just only had nurses,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: everybody would be cured,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause them niggas can't wait to shove a needle in your neck
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: and get you the fuck out of there.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All I'm saying is if you can't punch the drywall,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you shouldn't be hanging my drywall.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Tattoos let me know that you're a blue collar worker.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like you, you don't do anything.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You don't sweat for work.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Not at all, but look at this motherfucker.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He's got his tattoos hitting,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: he be drumming his fucking ass off.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You sitting over here laid back like a bitch.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time, I'm sorry.
lines.label: fluff
